description:
Join us on Wednesday, May 27, from 4–8 PM at Whispering Vine Fourth Street for a Hope Family Wines tasting built around four Paso Robles favorites: Austin Hope Cabernet Sauvignon, Treana Red Blend, Quest Cabernet Franc, and Troublemaker Red Blend.

Tasting Fee: $20 per person

Special Guest: Cam Nicholson

Featured Wines:

  • Austin Hope Cabernet Sauvignon 2023 – Winery $62 – Dark ruby and full-bodied, with black currant, blackberry, violet, mocha, and dried spice carried by polished tannins and a broad Paso Robles finish.
  • Treana Red Blend 2023 – Winery $39 – A Cabernet Sauvignon and Syrah blend with plum, black cherry, violet, blueberry preserve, and warm baking spice over firm tannins and a rich finish.
  • Quest Cabernet Franc 2024 – Winery $27 – Lifted and savory with anise, mint, warm chocolate, black fruit, and leather, finishing with fine tannins and balanced acidity.
  • Troublemaker Red Blend – Winery $20 – Dark cherry, dried plum, sage, black currant, espresso, and sweet oak with plush fruit and soft but persistent tannins.

Spend the evening exploring one of Paso Robles’ most recognizable portfolios with Cam Nicholson and a lineup that moves from polished Cabernet to bold Central Coast blends.
title: Hope Family Wines Tasting
